name: write_placer_checkpoint
full_help:
write_placer_checkpoint

Description: 
Write Placer Checkpoint

Syntax: 
write_placer_checkpoint  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] <directory>

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-force]     Overwrite existing checkpoint directory for current phase
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  <directory>  Design checkpoint directory
               Values: A directory name with alphanumeric characters

Categories:

arguments.description: Overwrite existing checkpoint directory for current phase
Suspend message limits during command execution
